summary: Candidate next goals now carry agent-usable draft metadata: each candidate includes draft_args, draft_command, and draft_rule so Skills can create the next draft Nori Contract without reconstructing CLI flags, while the rule keeps candidates separate from approved AC, phases, task lists, and evidence.
reviewability: Rerun the listed checks and inspect resume/status/context export candidate_goals for draft_args, draft_command, and draft_rule.
limitations: This improves agent routing metadata for generated candidates; the user or agent must still select or revise a candidate and approve the resulting draft before any next-loop implementation counts.
